title: I learned AI in 6 months with $0. Here's the exact roadmap
post:
Six months ago, I couldn't prompt an AI to write a LinkedIn post. Today, I run AI projects for a Fortune 500 company.

Zero dollars spent. Here's exactly how:

Months 1-2: Foundation
- Free courses on Coursera/edX (Andrew Ng's AI courses are still the best)
- Built small projects with ChatGPT API
- Joined every AI Discord community I could find

Months 3-4: Specialization
- Focused on prompt engineering and AI agent development
- Contributed to open source projects
- Started documenting everything on a public blog

Months 5-6: Portfolio + Paid work
- Interviewed aggressively, treating AI knowledge like professional experience
- Landed first contract at $75/hour
- Turned that into a full-time role

The key: Learn by building. Don't wait to feel 'ready.'

What's your biggest barrier to learning AI?
